text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — please check out the mod guidelines and feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to working with you!

Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events — keep an eye on the events channel for upcoming opportunities. Don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!

Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a Member. We're glad you're here — feel free to explore, introduce yourself, and jump into conversations. Let us know if you need any help getting started!

Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. We're so glad to have your experience and guidance in the community — please check out the mentor resources and don't hesitate to connect with the team. We're lucky to have you!
